steps.title: Use the fellowship purpose
steps.content: The fellowship is for exceptional folk and traditional artists, and Ramon Soto received it for lifetime contributions to the arts. The blank should mean recognizing or celebrating artists.

steps.title: Choose the recognition word
steps.content: A would mean start the artists, B would mean diminish them, and C would mean divert attention from them. A fellowship instead gives respect and recognition. The answer is D.
